response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines, it is important to approach the topic in a respectful and informed manner. As a school teacher, I have seen firsthand how misinformation can spread quickly and cause unnecessary fear and confusion. Here are some strategies that I recommend:
